subject: FW: Hi fro Kira
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Kira Titeneva [mailto:kiruh@mail.ru] 
Sent: Friday, September 21, 2007 5:40 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Hi fro Kira


Dear Lesley!

I got my visa for USA.
I am sorry I dont have a chance to call.
As I promised to contact as soon as I can about my return ticket.
I would like to go back to NYC through Moscow again.
And if its possible I would go from Almaty to Moscow on 15th of October
and 25th October from Moscow to NYC.
The days can vary 14,15,16 October and 24,25,26 October as it would be
easier for you.
Thank you so much again for everything. If you need to contact me its +7
702 359 2000
I will see you in NYC 


Sincerely, Kira Titeneva
